summary: Design presentation-native decks with a monochrome 80-layout system spanning covers, agendas, image splits, evidence tables, process sequences, charts, and metric grids.

presentation.title: Codex Grid Layout Library
presentation.objective: Select a presentation-native layout that matches the requested content shape before writing slide copy.
presentation.silhouettePolicy: Choose by templateUse, layoutFamily, slots, and density budget. Vary silhouettes across adjacent slides.
presentation.speakerNotePolicy: Add concise presenter intent and evidence caveats when the generated deck requires them.
